title: Pigeon Phantoms
description: Turns Phantoms into Pigeons featuring scuffed bird sounds and bird poop
body:
## **IMPORTANT: ‼️‼️[OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) MOD REQUIRED.**‼️‼️


## Pigeons!
This resource pack turns Phantoms into Pigeons

Thanks to the model it's now easier to hit them because it's way more clear where the hitbox is.

Also, they drop bird poop now

![poop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d86c5ead2bd42c537a2dfc316405e89b75b83bb.png)

## Other stuff

[ hit and death sound effect credit](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qdmmihMHoaU)

if anyone has better pigeon sounds i could use pls message me on discord 🙏 

also if you know how to get rid of the particles please let me know either directly or in the PMC comments
